publishedAbstract: * Failed to get object from versioning bucket with version-id option, "NoSuchKey" error is reported: ~~~ $ aws s3api get-object--bucket huitestpvbucket-34ed840e-8983-4d6a-adef-d5e0ee92937e--key testfile--version-id nbver-1--endpoint http://s3-openshift-storage.apps.huiocp412.lab.upshift.rdu2.redhat.com testfileout2 An error occurred (NoSuchKey) when calling the GetObject operation: The specified key does not exist. ~~~
publishedTitle: Failed to get object from versioning bucket with version-id option
